column25: Clean, simple, spacious, functional, white space, high contrast, geometric, sans-serif, grid-based, essential
column28: Subtle hover (200-250ms), smooth transitions, sharp shadows if any, clear type hierarchy, fast loading
column29: Enterprise apps, dashboards, documentation sites, SaaS platforms, professional tools
column30: Creative portfolios, entertainment, playful brands, artistic experiments
column40: Design a minimalist landing page. Use: white space, geometric layouts, sans-serif fonts, high contrast, grid-based structure, essential elements only. Avoid shadows and gradients. Focus on clarity and functionality.
column41: display: grid, gap: 2rem, font-family: sans-serif, color: #000 or #FFF, max-width: 1200px, clean borders, no box-shadow unless necessary
column42: ☐ Grid-based layout 12-16 columns, ☐ Typography hierarchy clear, ☐ No unnecessary decorations, ☐ WCAG AAA contrast verified, ☐ Mobile responsive grid
column46: Soft UI, embossed, debossed, convex, concave, light source, subtle depth, rounded (12-16px), monochromatic
column47: Light pastels: Soft Blue #C8E0F4, Soft Pink #F5E0E8, Soft Grey #E8E8E8
column49: Soft box-shadow (multiple: -5px -5px 15px, 5px 5px 15px), smooth press (150ms), inner subtle shadow
column50: Health/wellness apps, meditation platforms, fitness trackers, minimal interaction UIs
column51: Complex apps, critical accessibility, data-heavy dashboards, high-contrast required
column61: Create a neumorphic UI with soft 3D effects. Use light pastels, rounded corners (12-16px), subtle soft shadows (multiple layers), no hard lines, monochromatic color scheme with light/dark variations. Embossed/debossed effect on interactive elements.
column62: border-radius: 12-16px, box-shadow: -5px -5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 5px 5px 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.8), background: linear-gradient(145deg, color1, color2), transform: scale on press
column63: ☐ Rounded corners 12-16px consistent, ☐ Multiple shadow layers (2-3), ☐ Pastel color verified, ☐ Monochromatic palette checked, ☐ Press animation smooth 150ms
column67: Frosted glass, transparent, blurred background, layered, vibrant background, light source, depth, multi-layer
column69: Vibrant: Electric Blue #0080FF, Neon Purple #8B00FF, Vivid Pink #FF1493, Teal #20B2AA
column70: Backdrop blur (10-20px), subtle border (1px solid rgba white 0.2), light reflection, Z-depth
column71: Modern SaaS, financial dashboards, high-end corporate, lifestyle apps, modal overlays, navigation
column72: Low-contrast backgrounds, critical accessibility, performance-limited, dark text on dark
column82: Design a glassmorphic interface with frosted glass effect. Use backdrop blur (10-20px), translucent overlays (rgba 10-30% opacity), vibrant background colors, subtle borders, light source reflection, layered depth. Perfect for modern overlays and cards.
column83: backdrop-filter: blur(15px), background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15), border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2), -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(15px), z-index layering for depth
column84: ☐ Backdrop-filter blur 10-20px, ☐ Translucent white 15-30% opacity, ☐ Subtle border 1px light, ☐ Vibrant background verified, ☐ Text contrast 4.5:1 checked
column85: --blur-amount: 15px, --glass-opacity: 0.15, --border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2), --background: vibrant color, --text-color: light/dark based on BG
